message:
fix(server): suppress clippy needless_pass_by_value on push_event

The push_event method takes MailEvent by value with 80+ call sites.
Changing to &MailEvent would require updating all callers for minimal
benefit since the function already clones internally. Suppressing the
lint with a justification comment is the pragmatic choice.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
